mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMP_INFO ( COMPANY_NUMBER, COMP_IMAGE_PATH, COMP_CEO_NAME, COMP_FND_YEAR, COMP_EMPL_CNT, COMP_REV, COMP_CAP, COMP_TYPE, COMP_SUMMARY, COMP_TECH, COMP_MAIN_BIZ, COMP_INFO, COMP_SVC_HIST, COMP_PAGE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{companyNumber}, #{filePath}, #{compCeoName}, #{compFndYear}, #{compEmplCnt}, #{compRev}, #{compCap}, #{compType}, #{compSummary}, #{compTech}, #{compMainBiz}, #{compInfo}, #{compSvcHist}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT C.COMPANY_NUMBER, C.COMPANY_NAME, C.COMPANY_BRN, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS, C.COMPANY_STATE, CI.COMP_IMAGE_PATH, CI.COMP_CEO_NAME, CI.COMP_FND_YEAR, CI.COMP_EMPL_CNT, CI.COMP_REV, CI.COMP_CAP, CI.COMP_TYPE, CI.COMP_SUMMARY, CI.COMP_TECH, CI.COMP_MAIN_BIZ, CI.COMP_INFO, CI.COMP_SVC_HIST, JP.JOB_POST_PROFILE, JP.JOB_POST_CONTENT, JP.JOB_POST_PROCESS, JP.JOB_POST_METHOD, JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING FROM TBL_COMPANY_MEMBER CM JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON CM.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE CM.USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber}
